overall.description: A nighttime walk along a wet suburban sidewalk in a video game environment (GTA V), passing by a mansion entrance and street lamps while vehicles drive by on the adjacent road. The scene features atmospheric lighting with reflections on the rain-soaked pavement.

events.description: ground surface transitions from brick driveway to concrete sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking away from a mansion entrance along a fenced sidewalk

notable_agents.action: vehicle headlights visible approaching in the distance

entered.detail: large two-story house with illuminated windows behind a fence
tall stone pillar with ornate lamp marking the property entrance
decorative black metal gate between stone pillars
lit ornate lamp casting warm light on the sidewalk
tall palm tree visible behind the fence line

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the entrance to a mansion, with a large house visible behind a wrought iron gate. The camera walks forward along a brick pavement that transitions to concrete, passing a lit street lamp on a stone pillar. The sidewalk is enclosed by a tall fence on the left and a multi-lane road on the right.

events.description: blue sedan passes by closely on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as vehicles pass by on the wet road

notable_agents.action: blue sedan driving past with headlights reflecting on wet pavement

entered.detail: series of stone pillars supporting the fence line
wooden slatted fence sections between stone pillars

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk enclosed by a stone and wood fence on the left and a road on the right. A blue sedan passes by closely on the road, its headlights reflecting off the wet pavement. The palm tree trunk is now visible near the fence line.

events.description: dark SUV passes by on the right
white sedan approaches and passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: walking past a mailbox mounted on the fence while observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving past with bright headlights

entered.detail: black mailbox mounted on the stone fence pillar
well-maintained grass visible behind the wooden fence

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the fenced sidewalk, passing a black mailbox mounted on a stone pillar. Multiple vehicles including an SUV and a white sedan pass by on the road. The stone and wood fence continues with manicured grass visible behind it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-soaked suburban sidewalk that transitions from a grand estate entrance to a residential stretch lined with manicured greenery. It begins at the wrought iron gates of a mansion, moving across brick pavement that shifts into concrete as the camera passes a lit street lamp on a stone pillar. As the camera progresses, the scenery opens up to reveal a stone and wood fence and palm trees, while a blue sedan glides past with its headlights reflecting off the wet ground. The scene then continues along the fenced perimeter, passing a black mailbox mounted on a stone pillar before multiple vehicles, including an SUV and a white sedan, drive by on the adjacent road.
